Pandowdy Apple IIe Emulator
Table of Contents

Class SystemStatusSnapshotBuilder

Namespace
Pandowdy.EmuCore.Services
Assembly
Pandowdy.EmuCore.dll

Mutable builder for creating SystemStatusSnapshot instances.

public sealed class SystemStatusSnapshotBuilder
Inheritance
object
SystemStatusSnapshotBuilder
Inherited Members
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.ToString()

Remarks

Builder Pattern: Provides a mutable workspace for constructing new snapshots. All fields can be freely modified before calling Build() to produce an immutable SystemStatusSnapshot. This is more efficient than creating snapshots via the record's with syntax when modifying multiple fields.

Usage: Typically used internally by Mutate(Action<SystemStatusSnapshotBuilder>) to batch multiple soft switch updates into a single atomic state change.

Constructors

SystemStatusSnapshotBuilder(SystemStatusSnapshot)

Mutable builder for creating SystemStatusSnapshot instances.

public SystemStatusSnapshotBuilder(SystemStatusSnapshot s)

Parameters

s SystemStatusSnapshot

Initial snapshot to copy field values from.

Remarks

Builder Pattern: Provides a mutable workspace for constructing new snapshots. All fields can be freely modified before calling Build() to produce an immutable SystemStatusSnapshot. This is more efficient than creating snapshots via the record's with syntax when modifying multiple fields.

Usage: Typically used internally by Mutate(Action<SystemStatusSnapshotBuilder>) to batch multiple soft switch updates into a single atomic state change.

Methods

Build()

Builds an immutable SystemStatusSnapshot from the current field values.

public SystemStatusSnapshot Build()

Returns

SystemStatusSnapshot

A new immutable snapshot containing all current field values.

Remarks

This method can be called multiple times to create multiple snapshots from the same builder state. The builder remains mutable and can be modified after calling Build().
